reviews.comment:
Nafta de bajísima calidad. Llene el tanque y a partir de ahí tuve problemas en mí auto. No recomendable. Uno para por la Historia pero parecé que todo cambia

(Translated by Google)
Very low-quality gasoline. I filled the tank and from then on, my car had problems. Not recommended. One goes down in history, but it seems everything changes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREMjZEeC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio en la cual cargo combustible hace más de 30 años. Muy buena atención del personal.  Si sos socio del ACA obviamente tenes descuento.

(Translated by Google)
I've been filling up at this gas station for over 30 years. The staff is very helpful. If you're an ACA member, you obviously get a discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaXR2ZnhRRRAB
